name: Ark UI
description: Headless component library built on state machines for building accessible design systems

description.value: Headless component library built on state machines for building accessible design systems

license.comment: Open source MIT license, maintained by Chakra Systems

framework.comment: Multi-framework: @ark-ui/react, @ark-ui/vue, @ark-ui/svelte, @ark-ui/solid with API parity across all

styling-approach.comment: Completely unstyled/headless - zero styling opinions; bring your own CSS, Tailwind, CSS-in-JS, etc.

component-model.comment: Headless component library providing behavior and accessibility only, no visual styles

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (66.7% of codebase); fully typed API

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with Next.js, Nuxt (official module), SvelteKit, and other SSR frameworks; quickstart templates available

rsc-compatible.comment: Components are interactive client components; require 'use client' directive in Next.js App Router

design-system.comment: Headless library with no design system; Park UI provides styled components built on Ark UI

dark-mode.comment: Unstyled library - dark mode implementation is user's responsibility

theming-system.comment: No built-in theming - unstyled components allow complete custom theming

css-variables.comment: Unstyled library doesn't ship with CSS variables; users implement their own

design-tokens.comment: No design tokens provided - headless library focused on behavior and accessibility

rtl-support.comment: Built-in RTL support via LocaleProvider component and dir prop; components render correctly for RTL languages

component-count.comment: 45+ production-ready components including Accordion, Dialog, Select, DatePicker, ColorPicker, TreeView, etc.

text-input.comment: Headless library focuses on complex components; basic text inputs expected to be native HTML

textarea.comment: Not provided - use native HTML textarea

select.comment: Custom Select component with keyboard navigation, typeahead, and accessibility

multi-select.comment: Select component supports multiple selection mode

combobox.comment: Combobox component with autocomplete, filtering, and accessibility

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with indeterminate state support

radio.comment: Radio Group component for radio button groups

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for boolean toggle values

slider.comment: Range slider with single or multiple thumbs, keyboard navigation, RTL support

number-input.comment: Number Input component with increment/decrement controls and validation

tag-input.comment: Tags Input component for managing multiple tags with add/remove functionality

pin-input.comment: Pin Input component for OTP/PIN code entry with SSR aria-label support

color-picker.comment: Full Color Picker component with area, channel sliders, swatches, and eyedropper

date-picker.comment: Date Picker with calendar UI, range selection, and internationalization

time-picker.comment: Time Picker component for time selection

date-range-picker.comment: Date Picker supports range mode for selecting start and end dates

file-upload.comment: File Upload component with drag-and-drop support

dropzone.comment: File Upload includes dropzone functionality for drag-and-drop

rating-input.comment: Rating Group component for star rating or similar input

input-groups.comment: Not provided as distinct component - headless library focuses on behavior

input-with-dropdown.comment: Not provided, but can be composed using Select and other primitives

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group and Segment Group for grouped button controls

split-button.comment: Not provided, but can be composed with Menu component

table.comment: Not provided - use native HTML table or external table libraries

data-table.comment: Not provided - use TanStack Table or similar

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Not provided - use TanStack Virtual or similar virtualization libraries

tree-view.comment: Tree View component for hierarchical expandable tree structure

list-view.comment: Not provided - presentation component beyond headless scope

card.comment: Not provided - simple layout component beyond headless scope

avatar.comment: Avatar component with image and fallback support

badge.comment: Not provided - simple display component beyond headless scope

tag-chip-pill.comment: Not provided as standalone; Tags Input includes tag display

calendar.comment: Calendar view available as part of Date Picker component

alert.comment: Not provided as static alert component

toast-notification.comment: Toast component with auto-dismiss, placement options, and stacking

progress-bar.comment: Linear Progress component with determinate and indeterminate states

spinner-loader.comment: Not provided as distinct component; Progress can show indeterminate state

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component with focus trapping, backdrop, and accessibility

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component for slide-in panels from edge

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to trigger

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component with configurable delay and positioning

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component with keyboard navigation, submenus, checkboxes, radio items

context-menu.comment: Menu component supports context menu trigger for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Not provided; can be composed with Dialog and Combobox

tabs.comment: Tabs component with keyboard navigation and ARIA support

breadcrumb.comment: Not provided - navigation component beyond headless scope

pagination.comment: Pagination component for page navigation controls

stepper.comment: Steps component for multi-step process indicator and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: Not provided; use Menu component for similar functionality

sidebar.comment: Not provided; use Collapsible or custom implementation

grid.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond headless scope

stack.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond headless scope

container.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond headless scope

aspect-ratio.comment: Not provided - CSS layout beyond headless scope

collapsible.comment: Collapsible component for expandable/collapsible content sections

splitter.comment: Splitter component for resizable split panes

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations

form-libraries.comment: Has Field and Fieldset components; no documented bindings for React Hook Form, Formik, etc.

animation-libraries.comment: Components have data-state attributes for CSS transitions; no documented Framer Motion integration

icon-libraries.comment: Unstyled library - works with any icon library

date-libraries.comment: Uses @internationalized/date internally for Date Picker; supports internationalization

aria-compliant.comment: Accessibility-first: all components follow WAI-ARIA design patterns

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation support across all interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: WCAG compliant components tested with real assistive technologies

focus-management.comment: Proper focus trapping in dialogs, focus restoration, and programmatic focus management

wcag-level.comment: Components are WCAG compliant; docs indicate AA-level accessibility features

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent - accessibility-first design, WCAG compliant, screen reader tested, built on proven Zag.js state machines

bundle-size-full.comment: Not applicable - tree-shakeable library installed as individual components; full bundle not meaningful metric

bundle-size-core.comment: Ark v5 emphasizes smaller bundle size; individual component sizes vary; library focuses on tree-shaking

tree-shakeable.comment: Fully tree-shakeable; v5 introduced leaner components and adapters for more efficient builds

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior and accessibility; built on Zag.js state machines

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be imported individually and loaded on demand with code splitting

documentation-quality.comment: Good - comprehensive API docs, code examples for all frameworks, interactive examples, but fewer guides than Radix

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes interactive component examples and StackBlitz quickstart templates

figma-kit.comment: No Ark UI Figma kit; Park UI (built on Ark) has Figma kits available

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; install via npm/pnpm/yarn

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: @ark-ui/react has ~440k weekly downloads as of December 2025

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - 426 releases, 85+ contributors, maintained by Chakra Systems team

commercial-support.comment: Open source MIT licensed; no commercial support tier

style-override.comment: Class attributes for styling, data-state/data-part attributes for state-based styling; bring your own CSS/Tailwind

compound-components.comment: Extensive compound component pattern (e.g., Dialog.Root, Dialog.Trigger, Dialog.Content)

render-props.comment: Supports render props pattern via asChild for flexible composition

slots.comment: Vue/Svelte versions support slots; React uses compound components and asChild pattern

unstyled-mode.comment: Entirely unstyled by default - headless component library providing only behavior and accessibility
